overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing Aloy running through a scenic coastal landscape during golden hour. The character traverses grassy hillsides, passes massive mechanical wreckage, and descends rocky cliffs toward a misty waterfall while the camera follows from behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy coastal hillside with distant mechanical structures

agents.ego_description: running through tall grass toward the coastline with mechanical wreckage visible ahead

entered.detail: massive long-necked mechanical structure lying in the distance
calm blue body of water visible between hills
derelict metal building ruins on the hillside
tall green and brown grass covering the terrain

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Aloy running through a grassy coastal hillside during golden hour. In the distance, a massive mechanical Tallneck structure looms near the water, while ruined metal structures dot the left side of the landscape. The terrain is open with full sky visibility and warm sunlight illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: path through red vegetation near mechanical ruins

events.description: passing close by the massive mechanical Tallneck wreckage and entering area with red grass patches

agents.ego_description: running past the mechanical wreckage and through patches of distinctive red vegetation

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees lining the path

segments.scene_description: Aloy continues running past the massive mechanical Tallneck wreckage, transitioning into an area with distinctive red grass patches and scattered pine trees. The path narrows slightly as rocky cliffs appear on the left, and the mechanical structure recedes into the left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge trail overlooking coastal waters

events.description: turning directly toward the setting sun creating strong lens flare and dramatic backlighting

agents.ego_description: sprinting along the cliff edge with the sun directly ahead, overlooking the expansive coastline

entered.detail: bright golden lens flare from the setting sun
steep drop-off to the water below

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open cliff edge trail with the setting sun dead ahead, creating a dramatic lens flare. The terrain becomes rockier and more exposed as Aloy runs along the coastal path, with mist from a distant waterfall becoming visible and the water now visible to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky descent to misty waterfall pool

events.description: descending from open cliff trail to enclosed rocky area with waterfall and mist

agents.ego_description: carefully climbing down rocky terrain toward the misty waterfall and water pool below

entered.detail: cascading water falling into the pool below
uneven rocks and boulders near the water
calm water pool at the base of the waterfall

segments.scene_description: Aloy descends carefully down a narrow rocky path into a more enclosed area, reaching a misty waterfall. The bright sun flare disappears as the terrain becomes shadowed by surrounding cliffs, revealing a serene pool at the waterfall's base with atmospheric mist rising from the water.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sun-drenched coastal hillside into the shadowed depths of a misty waterfall. It begins with Aloy running through golden hour light across grassy terrain, passing ruined metal structures and a massive mechanical Tallneck looming in the distance. As she continues forward, the landscape shifts toward patches of red grass and scattered pine trees, with the mechanical wreckage receding as rocky cliffs begin to hem in the path. The scene then opens onto an exposed cliff edge trail where the setting sun creates a dramatic lens flare, revealing the ocean to the left and the distant haze of a waterfall ahead. Finally, the camera follows her descent down a narrow rocky path into a secluded area, where the bright sunlight gives way to cool shadows and atmospheric mist rising from a serene pool.
